facebook.caption:
16,975 reviews. 4.8 stars. VinWonders Phú Quốc keeps delivering.

Most tourists lump it in with "resort stuff" and skip it. Big mistake. This is a full-scale amusement park on Bãi Dài, rides, water slides, live shows, the works. Kids lose their minds. Adults forget to act cool.

Block a full day. You will need it.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Rides, water slides, live shows. One park. 4.8 stars from 16,975 people at VinWonders Phú Quốc. Bãi Dài has been hiding this the whole time. Don't save it for day four.

instagram.caption:
16,975 reviews. 4.8 stars. VinWonders Phú Quốc is not a skip.

Full day. Bring sunscreen. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Rides, shows, water slides. 4.8 stars. VinWonders Phú Quốc earns every one.
